name: Crab Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 pound crab meat -- Maryland Blue Crab
margarine, butter or oil -- for frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove all cartilage from crabmeat.
2. In a bowl, mix breadcrumbs, egg, mayonnaise and seasonings.
3. Add crabmeat and mix gently but thoroughly. If the mixture is too dry, add a little more mayonnaise.
4. Shape into 4-6 cakes.
5. Cook cakes in a frying pan, using just enough fat to prevent sticking, until browned; about 5 minutes on each side.
6. If desired, deep fry at 350 degrees for 2-3 minutes.
